# FM module FamilyRail primitive: era-attribute data-binding (ADR 0032 §2.3.3)

## Context

B-split of #14593 (horizon map v2, group B): the family rail as its own one-PR leaf — the visually smallest, contractually deepest primitive: it renders the resident's CURRENT episode family and must re-render in place on a family switch (same resident, ADR 0032 §2.3.3's live fixture).

## The Fix

The per-view triplet inside the agentos FM module (mount per #14631/#14632): (1) the FamilyRail component/mixin — a `--fm-family-*`-keyed left-border binding on a data field (era attribute; `harnessType`-derived proxy declared-as-such until #11318 lands); (2) unit specs — key→token mapping for all four families, unknown-key → neutral + `unclassified` badge, rebind-in-place fixture (instance stable across a family change); (3) NL-verifiable render row.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Rail binds a data field, never a constant; rebind re-renders in place (the §2.3.3 fixture — instance id stable).
- [ ] All four family tokens + the neutral degrade render (CARD-CONTRACT rows).
- [ ] Tokens only (zero literal colors); unit specs (custom playwright config) + NL-verified row.

## Out of Scope

StateDot (#14593, narrowed) · HealthSwatch (sibling) · card composition (#14598).

## Related

Epic #14560 (parent) · split-of #14593 · consumes merged tokens (`apps/agentos/resources/tokens.css`) + CARD-CONTRACT (PR #14627) · ADR 0032 §2.3.3.

Sweeps: current window; no equivalent; A2A clean. Structure-map: N/A.
